text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon and I go to the year-end grand prix,
the Arima Kinen, where she finds herself
overwhelmed by all the excitement.

Daiwa Scarlet wins the race, and the winning
concert with her at the center is truly
breathtaking.

After watching from the front row, Smart Falcon
is determined to make her next race, the Tokyo
Daishoten, just as exciting.

She reassures herself that dirt racing does deserve
the hype, and that she's done everything she can
to build it up.
